entries.title: Forged instructions sysvar bypass
entries.description: Wormhole bridge used forged sysvar account to bypass signature verification of transfer instructions. $320M loss.
entries.exploit_scenario: Attacker constructs a transaction with a forged sysvar account that passes the program's verification check, allowing unauthorized token transfers.

entries.title: Missing account validation in collateral backing
entries.description: Cashio failed to validate collateral accounts, allowing minting of unbacked CASH tokens. $52M loss.
entries.exploit_scenario: Attacker passes fake collateral accounts that are not validated for ownership or type, minting CASH without real backing.

entries.title: Forged price tick account via CPI
entries.description: Crema allowed attacker to report fake liquidity price via forged tick account in CPI call. $8.8M loss.
entries.exploit_scenario: Attacker constructs a fake tick account and passes it to the CPI call. Since program_id of the tick account is not verified, the fake account reports manipulated prices.

entries.title: Price manipulation via oracle feed
entries.description: Mango Markets exploited via price manipulation of oracle feeds, allowing attacker to drain liquidity. $114M loss.
entries.exploit_scenario: Attacker manipulates the oracle price feed by taking opposing positions, triggering liquidations at favorable prices.

entries.title: Economic exploit via bonding curve invariant
entries.description: Nirvana Finance bonding curve exploited for risk-free profit due to invariant mismatch. $3.5M loss.
entries.exploit_scenario: Attacker exploits a mismatch between the bonding curve invariant and the reward calculation to extract risk-free profit.

entries.title: Missing signer check on admin withdrawal
entries.description: Admin withdrawal function does not verify is_signer, allowing anyone to call it.
entries.exploit_scenario: Attacker calls the admin withdrawal function without being a signer, draining program funds.

entries.title: Arbitrary CPI without program_id verification
entries.description: Program invokes another program via CPI without verifying the target program_id.
entries.exploit_scenario: Attacker deploys a malicious program with the same interface. When the vulnerable program invokes CPI, the malicious program executes instead.

entries.title: PDA seed collision via manipulable input
entries.description: Program derives PDA using user-controlled input as seed without validation, allowing PDA substitution.
entries.exploit_scenario: Attacker crafts input that produces a PDA colliding with a legitimate account, gaining access to its funds.

entries.title: Unchecked integer overflow in token amount
entries.description: Token transfer amount calculation uses unchecked arithmetic, potential overflow on large values.
entries.exploit_scenario: Attacker passes large values that cause overflow, resulting in small actual transfer while crediting large amount.

entries.title: Reentrancy via chained CPI state update
entries.description: Program updates state after CPI call, allowing callee to observe stale state and exploit it.
entries.exploit_scenario: Attacker's program is invoked via CPI, sees stale state, and exploits the inconsistency before the caller updates.
